hero.subheading: A premium 1-on-1 English coaching program for adults.

whatIsProvox.heading: What is ProVox?
whatIsProvox.body: ProVox is a premium, personalized 1-on-1 English coaching program built specifically for adults and professionals who want to communicate naturally and confidently.
whatIsProvox.consultation: For a free consultation, contact Coach Brad

whatWeOffer.heading: Our Courses
whatWeOffer.subheading: Two programs. One goal — English that works for you.

courses.name: Communication Skills
courses.commitmentNote: Or enroll for 3 months for just 15,990,000₫
courses.description: Build the speaking and listening skills you need to communicate naturally and confidently in everyday English.
features: Each session is built specifically for your needs

courses.name: Professional Communication
courses.commitmentNote: Or enroll for 3 months for just 18,990,000₫
courses.description: A structured 12-week program built around the skills professionals need most — from communication etiquette to assertiveness.
features: The full Vox: Professional Communication curriculum
Full access to ProVox audio coaching materials
Personalized feedback tailored to your job

whatWeOffer.customBody: ProVox also offers ongoing coaching and custom curriculum development for individuals with specific goals or industries. If you need a program built around your exact needs, get in touch and we'll put something together.

curriculum.heading: What You'll Learn
curriculum.note: Your coach will tailor each session to your workplace and industry.

skills.title: Communication Etiquette
skills.description: Master the professional norms of English business communication across email, meetings, and workplace interactions.

skills.title: Clarity & Accuracy
skills.description: Speak and write with precision — eliminate ambiguity and build confidence in every professional message.

skills.title: Participating in Discussions
skills.description: Learn to contribute confidently in meetings, conference calls, and group settings.

skills.title: Professional Assertiveness
skills.description: Express your ideas, opinions, and boundaries clearly without losing professional rapport.

contact.heading: Start with a Free Consultation
contact.subheading: No commitment. Just a conversation about your goals.
contact.successMessage: Thank you! Coach Brad will be in touch within 24 hours.
contact.errorMessage: Something went wrong. Please try again or contact us directly on Zalo.
